tasks.notes: Added fileURLToPath/dirname shim at top of compose-permissions.ts. Mirrors install.ts pattern.
Added isContainedInWorkFolder() to platform.ts. Handles Windows drive-letter paths without path.posix.resolve. Both receive-files.ts and send-files.ts updated. 6 new tests added.
Audit confirmed agent.username never shell-interpolated. Added schema docs noting spaces allowed. Added getSSHConfig and isContainedInWorkFolder unit tests.
Created classifySshError() helper in ssh-error-messages.ts. Applied in registerMember(). Onboarding hook already gated on ✅ prefix. Added 9 unit tests.
Build: 0 errors. Tests: 812 passed (46 files), 3 skipped. Baseline was 786 tests / 45 files. Each issue added ≥1 new test. Pushed to origin.
Added pre-flight basename collision check in send-files.ts (lines 59-72). Returns ⛔ error listing conflicting pairs before any transfer. 4 unit tests added in send-files-collision.test.ts.
Created src/services/task-cleanup.ts with cleanupStaleTasks() (1h success / 7d failed retention, PID-alive skip) and scheduleTaskCleanup(). Wired into index.ts server startup. 9 unit tests added.

Created src/services/credential-cleanup.ts with 55-min default TTL timer (unref'd). scheduleCredentialCleanup() called after deploy in provision-vcs-auth.ts; cancelCredentialCleanup() called in remove-member.ts. 8 unit tests added.
remove-member.ts: busy-check (readMemberStatus), cancelCredentialCleanup, VCS revoke, SSH authorized_keys removal, local key cleanup. statusline.ts: added readMemberStatus export. 9 unit tests added.
Build: 0 errors. Tests: 846 passed (50 files), 3 skipped. Baseline was 812 tests / 46 files. Phase 2 added 34 new tests across 4 new test files. Pushed to origin.
ClaudeProvider.composePermissionConfig() now includes mcpServers.apra-fleet.disabled=true in every settings.local.json delivered to members. 2 new tests in compose-permissions.test.ts.

Created src/services/update-check.ts with fire-and-forget GitHub API fetch (5s timeout, silent on failure). fleet_status prepends one-line notice when newer stable release available; JSON format adds updateAvailable object. Pre-release tags ignored. SKILL.md updated. 10 new tests in update-check.test.ts.
Build: 0 errors. Tests: 858 passed (51 files), 3 skipped. Phase 2 baseline was 846. Phase 3 added 12 new tests. Pushed to origin.
